From-To: open->analyzed

I can't repeat this with the latest version of the port.  The only thing I 
can think if that might make this work for you is if you were using MD5 instead 
of DES for your system crypt(), but even that I'm not sure about.  Does the 
latest version of the saint port (3.2.1) fix this for you?
